data.title: A new CEO takes over the top job at Essendant
data.description: Dave Rickard, formerly Essendant’s interim chief transformation officer, has been appointed as the company’s new CEO, effective immediately.

data.title: Alibaba posts strong Q3 revenue growth, thanks to ecommerce and AI
data.description: The company’s international business-to-business (B2B) ecommerce segment, Alibaba International Digital Commerce Group (AIDC), recorded a significant 32% year-over-year revenue increase, reaching $5.17 billion.

data.title: Adidas to put Amazon's Buy with Prime options on its website and app
data.description: The new integration will bring fulfillment options from Amazon to Prime members shopping on Adidas' online channels.

data.title: Michaels names David Boone as its new CEO
data.description: David Boone will take over chief executive role after Ashley Buchanan left Michaels to become the new CEO at Kohl's.

data.title: Stellantis expands U.S. B2B ecommerce for remanufactured vehicle parts
data.description: Less than six months after launch, B-Parts now stocks over one million original used parts, sourced from more than ten states and compatible with over 60 car brands.
